concept: Please design a turn-based game where combat takes place on interconnected gear systems that rotate between turns. Unit positioning must account for how gear rotation will affect battlefield configuration after each action is taken. Different gear sizes rotate at different rates, creating predictable but complex movement patterns that must be anticipated several turns ahead. Special units can temporarily jam gears, reverse rotation direction, or create bridges between non-connected gears. The campaign follows the journey of tiny mechanical beings living inside a massive broken clockwork entity as they battle invading corrosive elements threatening their mechanical home.
